author: mj12albert
body:
Preview: https://deploy-preview-3131--base-ui.netlify.app/react/components/form

Adds `onFormSubmit` that provides form values as a JS object as an argument, and `preventDefault`s the native submit event when used.

A lot of modern apps submit forms to backends like REST APIs, GraphQL, RPC that typically receive JS/JSON payloads instead of FormData, and there isn't a simple/robust way to easily convert them while accounting for numeric and/or array values ([example](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/blob/83d31d33d02331d3d34d787a9a327a9467b4b334/docs/src/app/(private)/experiments/forms/form.tsx#L79-L84)).

- [x] I have followed (at least) the [PR section of the contributing guide](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/blob/HEAD/CONTRIBUTING.md#sending-a-pull-request).
title: [form] Add `onFormSubmit` callback
